g.text: Launches the app window, loads login / registration screens
cv2.VideoCapture(index) · sets 1280×720 · fallback to alt index
Detects face bounding box with HaarCascade
60 photos per student · 6 pose phases · 200×200 px each
Reads all train_images/ → enhance_face() → grayscale arrays
Hashes student_id to numeric label · saves models/label_map.json
HaarCascade detects face → ROI → enhance_face() → recognizer.predict()
Looks up label_map → get_student_by_regno(DB) → draws box + name
Writes Present + timestamp to MySQL · deduped per session by present_student_ids set
